{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Glowing orange wasps
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Petrus]] can produce a swarm of glowing orange wasps from the air before his red-marked hand.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c19">''House of Blades'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
